_about: PIBO-ReaxFF for the H/Mo/S system (Manuscript: Bae et al.). Two profiles are baked into a single config: 'manuscript' reproduces the published settings (50 LHS + 2000 BO iters x 500 replications), 'demo' is a Colab-friendly subset that runs end-to-end in minutes. Switch via optimization.profile.

lammps._pair_style_note: auto-detected at runtime; lammps_runner picks reaxff (modern) or reax/c (legacy)

loss_weights._about_categories: Per-frame weights from Manuscript Table 1; consumed by ReaxFFLoss._frame_weights via DFTFrame.category.

optimization._about_manuscript: Manuscript settings: 50 LHS init + up to 2000 BO iters per replication, 500 replications per parameter block, patience-based early stopping (50 unimproved evals after 200-iter burn-in).
optimization._about_demo: Demo settings: ~1-2 orders of magnitude smaller than manuscript so Colab finishes in minutes. Reproduces the same staged-acquisition behavior on a sparse search.

acquisition._about: Manuscript 짠'BO with adaptive GPs': stage-conditioned acquisition.

gp._about_dim_scaling: Manuscript: rescale loss by sqrt(np/10), feature-normalize when np > 20, init hyperparameters as functions of np with dimension-scaled jitter.
